# Boomer Ball

> Oklahoma Sooners football analytics for Sooner Nation — stats, roster, schedule, news, and legends.

Boomer Ball (https://boomerball.app) is a fan-inspired college football analytics site covering the University of Oklahoma Sooners. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by the University of Oklahoma.

## Primary pages

- Home: https://boomerball.app/
- 2025 Season Stats: https://boomerball.app/stats
- 2026 Roster & Coaches: https://boomerball.app/roster
- Football Schedule: https://boomerball.app/schedule
- Sooner News: https://boomerball.app/news
- Monday Morning Quarterback (weekly recaps): https://boomerball.app/mmqb
- Legend Land (Heisman winners & titles): https://boomerball.app/legend-land
- Join / Premium: https://boomerball.app/join

## Key facts (2025 season)

- Record: 10-3 overall, 6-2 SEC
- Points per game: 26.23
- Points allowed per game: 15.46
- Total yards per game: 354.3
- 2026 season opener: vs UTEP, September 5, 2026 (Norman, OK)

## Data sources

- University of Oklahoma Athletics: https://soonersports.com
- ESPN College Football: https://www.espn.com/college-football/team/_/id/201

## Sitemap

https://boomerball.app/sitemap.xml
